title: Better Horror Modpack
description: A chilling Minecraft mod pack featuring terrifying creatures, creepy sounds, and eerie shaders. Enhanced animations and survival tools keep you on edge as you explore haunted caves and foggy forests-alone or with friends. Every shadow hides a new scare.
body:
Features:

Terrifying New Threats

Encounter relentless stalkers like the Cave Dweller, a rare anomaly that haunts caves, stalking and chasing players in claustrophobic darkness with disturbing sounds and behaviors.

Face the legendary Herobrine with From The Fog, which blurs the line between reality and nightmare-expect mysterious structures, chilling footsteps, and the sensation of being watched at all times.

Beware The Man From The Fog, an unpredictable, night-stalking creature with advanced AI, custom models, and frightening new sounds, designed to keep you on edge.

Immersive Horror Atmosphere

Enhanced mob models, animations, and textures with Fresh Animations, Geckolib, [EMF] Entity Model Features, and [ETF] Entity Texture Features add realism and unease.

Eerie environmental effects with Hysteria Shaders, Iris Shaders, and ImmediatelyFast for haunting lighting and fog.

Quality Sounds mod deepens the sense of immersion with new, unsettling audio cues.

Survival with a Twist

Navigate the darkness with limited resources, as torches may be extinguished or replaced by sinister variants by unseen forces.

Use tools like Beans Backpacks and Comforts to survive longer in hostile environments.

Crawl and Radiant Gear add new movement and equipment options to help you escape or confront the horrors lurking in the shadows.

Quality of Life and Multiplayer

Simple Voice Chat and Minimal Coords HUD keep you connected and oriented as you explore together.

Just Enough Items, Mod Menu, and configuration mods ensure smooth gameplay and easy customization.

Are you brave enough to survive the nightmares that await?
